Uses of Class
com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.ECIGravitation

  • Packages that use ECIGravitation 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial
    Contains inertial entities.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.estimators
    Contains estimators for several inertial entities.

    • Uses of ECIGravitation in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial

      Constructors in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial with parameters of type ECIGravitation 
      Constructor Description
      ECIGravitation​(ECIGravitation input)
      Constructor.

    • Uses of ECIGravitation in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.estimators

      Methods in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.estimators that return ECIGravitation 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ECIGravitation ECIGravitationEstimator.estimateAndReturnNew​(double x, double y, double z)
      Estimates gravitational acceleration resolved about ECI-frame axes.
      ECIGravitation ECIGravitationEstimator.estimateAndReturnNew​(com.irurueta.geometry.Point3D position)
      Estimates gravitation acceleration resolved about ECI-frame axes for a given position expressed in ECI coordinates.
      ECIGravitation ECIGravitationEstimator.estimateAndReturnNew​(ECIFrame frame)
      Estimates gravitational acceleration resolved about ECI-frame axes for a position on a given ECI frame.
      ECIGravitation ECIGravitationEstimator.estimateAndReturnNew​(com.irurueta.units.Distance x, com.irurueta.units.Distance y, com.irurueta.units.Distance z)
      Estimates gravitation acceleration resolved about ECI-frame axes for a given position expressed in ECI coordinates.
      static ECIGravitation ECIGravitationEstimator.estimateGravitationAndReturnNew​(double x, double y, double z)
      Estimates gravitational acceleration resolved about ECI-frame axes.
      static ECIGravitation ECIGravitationEstimator.estimateGravitationAndReturnNew​(com.irurueta.geometry.Point3D position)
      Estimates gravitation acceleration resolved about ECI-frame axes for a given position expressed in ECI coordinates.
      static ECIGravitation ECIGravitationEstimator.estimateGravitationAndReturnNew​(ECIFrame frame)
      Estimates gravitational acceleration resolved about ECI-frame axes for a position on a given ECI frame.
      static ECIGravitation ECIGravitationEstimator.estimateGravitationAndReturnNew​(com.irurueta.units.Distance x, com.irurueta.units.Distance y, com.irurueta.units.Distance z)
      Estimates gravitation acceleration resolved about ECI-frame axes for a given position expressed in ECI coordinates.
